Module initialization, custom exceptions, PULSEv2 datagram handling, unit tests, version control, project configuration, and documentation for the PULSEv2 protocol suite.

## Folders
- **[pebble](pebble/README.md)**: Module initialization, custom exceptions, PULSEv2 datagram handling, and namespace package declaration.
- **[tests](tests/README.md)**: Unit tests for modules like framing, link, PCMP, PPP, and transports, plus mock and helper for timers.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files and directories to ignore in version control for a Python project using `.gitignore`.
- **[pyproject.toml](pyproject.toml.md)**: Configuration for the `pebble.pulse2` Python project, specifying dependencies and package details.
- **[README.rst](README.rst.md)**: Documentation for the Python implementation of the PULSEv2 protocol suite.
